posts.raw_content:
They did the same as they always do. If there is even a rumor or a hint that something might happen that would make oil go up, boom! To the moon! Then they sit on their fake unwarranted high as a plateau and come down soooo sloooow... Even when their "scare" turned out not to be real in the first place. 

I am no oil and energy pricing expert, but I am sick and tired of those things not having some legal tether to reality as opposed "oh we are scared something might happen."
